metadata.title: Open Your Eyes; Let This Destroy You
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Open Your Eyes, Wide; Let In This Light
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Let This Destroy You
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - No Act Has Gone Unseen; We Could Not Hide, Neither Can You
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - The Air Is Bitter Here; We Walk Till Daylight Dies
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - From Nothing Rise, To Her, Our Maker, Return
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We, Testament To Our Own Ruin
